name: wirenet-manager
description: Bootstrap and run a local work-memory Manager with portable, reviewable Project Packs.

interface.shortDescription: Local work memory and Project Pack routing
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap a content-only local Manager, keep external projects connected through local bindings, and maintain portable four-file Project Packs without copying source code, media, or raw data.
defaultPrompt: Use $wirenet-manager to show my current stack.
